title: fix-empty-response-rca data contract extensions
description: Extends specs/codex-empty-turn-recovery/data-schema.json with the wsErrorReason field on TransportSnapshot + log payload, plus a new metric for cache-equilibrium detection. All additions are backward-compatible: existing readers ignore the new field; schemaVersion stays at 1.

WsErrorReason.title: WsErrorReason
WsErrorReason.description: When wsFrameCount is 0 and the empty turn was caused by a WS-layer event (onerror / onclose / first_frame_timeout), this string carries the verbatim reason. null for ws.onclose with frameCount > 0 (the original ws_truncation case where the close itself is the signal). Added by fix-empty-response-rca DD-2 / DD-5.

EmptyTurnLogEntryExtension.title: Additive fields on the empty-turn log entry
EmptyTurnLogEntryExtension.description: These fields extend the existing JSONL line shape from codex-empty-turn-recovery. Treat as optional in any reader.

CacheEquilibriumDetectionEvent.title: Cache equilibrium detection (L1 observability)
CacheEquilibriumDetectionEvent.description: Emitted by the L1 fix when prompt.ts:derivePredictedCacheMiss observes the same cache.read value across N consecutive turns. Goes to a separate JSONL channel (does NOT pollute empty-turns.jsonl). Channel: <state>/codex/cache-equilibrium.jsonl. Bus channel: codex.cacheEquilibrium.

lockedCacheRead.description: The cache.read value that has been observed identical across consecutive turns

consecutiveTurns.description: How many consecutive turns observed the lockedCacheRead value (threshold for emission, default 3)

lastFinishedMessageIds.description: Message IDs of the consecutive assistant turns that hit the lock — for forensic join with session DB

continuationInvalidatedAt.description: The session.execution.continuationInvalidatedAt timestamp at the moment of detection. Helps confirm DD-1 hypothesis about sticky behavior.

M8.name: Cache equilibrium incidents per session
M8.description: How often a session hit the L1 stable-equilibrium pattern in the rolling window
M8.command: jq -s 'group_by(.sessionId) | map({sessionId: .[0].sessionId, count: length, maxConsecutive: max_by(.consecutiveTurns).consecutiveTurns}) | sort_by(.count) | reverse' < ${XDG_STATE_HOME}/opencode/codex/cache-equilibrium.jsonl

M9.name: Rotation events caused by empty turns (BEFORE fix; should be 0 AFTER)
M9.description: Joins empty-turns.jsonl with rotation log; counts rotations within 60s of an empty-turn classification. Operator-side join; no new instrumentation needed.
M9.command: # After Phase 1 deploys, this should show 0 rotation events tagged within 60s of any empty-turn JSONL line. Operators use it as the regression watchdog.

M10.name: wsErrorReason cluster (DD-5)
M10.description: Distribution of WS error reasons; identifies which network-level failures are most common
